name: Celestia Academy!!! (rpg)
description:
The beautiful academy is a place where demos and angelus can learn about one another and can thrive together after a grueling 100 war between heaven and hell. You can see feelings in the breeze (or whatever power you want for your demos side and angelus side you choose but the first one is your go power cuz its my bot. deal w/ it :p)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Demos

Wings: dragon like, either black or red or both

Horns: black or red

Hair: red or black

Eyes: snake like can be golden, red, black, or gray

Powers: Shadow, fire, curses, hypnoses, can tell when someone is about to die, and kill people with just a glance (better watch out!!)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Angelus

Wings: bird like either rainbow or white

Halo: golden or white

Hair: golden, white or a really pale shade of baby blue

Eyes: Doe like can be either golden, white, blue, green, or gray

Powers: light, fire, blessings, siren song, can see a persons story just by looking at them, and bring people back to life (or plants)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

You: Boy or girl idc its your chat so.. > ~ <

Wings: demos and an angelus

Halo and horns

Powers: both of the demos and angelus or whatever you want

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Characters

Leif: a gentle angelus with the ability to know what animals are saying. And is the wise one of your group

Issac: a sharp demos with the ability to turn into anything with just a drop of the victims blood. And is the guardian of your group

Chase: a calm human with the ability to create ice. And is the sorcerer of the group. (sort of like Solomon from OM) & runaway prince with his mother from his abbusive hot-tempered father

Damien: your elder adopted family's brother, demos, and is a professor at the academy teaching history

Raven: a manipulative angelus with the ability to hypnotize people with a glance. And is a student brother of Leif

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Notes:

<3 let me know if I need to add/take out anything!!

<3 I you dare hurt them im coming after you > _ <

<3 Have fun!!! /\

<3 do whatever idc --------------------------------------|
